summary: Solid test suite with good coverage of core glob pattern matching, label deduplication, priority ordering, and error handling. Tests are well-organized with clear naming and proper isolation. However, some edge cases are missing: no explicit test for JSON parsing failures, empty rules array, OutputFormat parameter variations (Json vs Lines), or case sensitivity. The act-based integration tests provide valuable end-to-end validation but rely on fragile output parsing with hardcoded markers (LABELS_START/LABELS_END) that must be present in the workflow. Fixture usage is inconsistent between unit tests (hardcoded data) and act tests (separate fixture files). Would catch most regressions but could be more comprehensive in boundary condition coverage.
